requirement_topic.en: Samoa Market Access - MCIL, Customs, OOTR, EPC, and Electrical Product Treatment
requirement_topic.zh: 萨摩亚市场准入——MCIL、海关、OOTR、EPC及电气产品处理
requirement_topic.zht: 薩摩亞市場准入——MCIL、海關、OOTR、EPC及電氣產品處理

summary.en: Samoa's Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (MCIL) handles commerce, industry, consumer, and standards-related functions, but Samoa does not appear to have a strong dedicated standards body for EVSE. The Office of the Regulator (OOTR) regulates electricity-sector matters, and Electric Power Corporation (EPC) is the utility project gate for grid-connected charger installations. EV chargers should be treated as electrical equipment requiring product identification, HS code review, safety documentation, English labelling and manuals, importer responsibility, and confirmation of any applicable customs, consumer, standards, telecom, electricity, or project obligations. A single official Samoa EVSE-specific whole-unit certification rule was not confirmed from public official sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚商业、工业和劳工部（MCIL）负责商业、工业、消费者及标准相关职能，但萨摩亚似乎没有强力专门EVSE标准机构。Office of the Regulator（OOTR）监管电力行业事项，Electric Power Corporation（EPC）是并网充电桩安装的公用事业项目关口。电动汽车充电桩应作为电气设备处理，需要进行产品识别、HS编码审查、安全文件、英文标签和手册、进口商责任确认，并确认任何适用的海关、消费者、标准、电信、电力或项目义务。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认萨摩亚存在单一EVSE整机专门认证规则。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞商業、工業和勞工部（MCIL）負責商業、工業、消費者及標準相關職能，但薩摩亞似乎沒有強力專門EVSE標準機構。Office of the Regulator（OOTR）監管電力行業事項，Electric Power Corporation（EPC）是併網充電樁安裝的公用事業項目關口。電動汽車充電樁應作為電氣設備處理，需要進行產品識別、HS編碼審查、安全文件、英文標籤和手冊、進口商責任確認，並確認任何適用的海關、消費者、標準、電信、電力或項目義務。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認薩摩亞存在單一EVSE整機專門認證規則。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (MCIL) commerce, consumer, and standards-related functions
Office of the Regulator (OOTR) electricity-sector oversight
Electric Power Corporation (EPC) project connection and commissioning requirements
Samoa Customs import and HS-code requirements

summary.en: China-market chargers are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 for DC communication, and China domestic certification or quality-control requirements where applicable. China CCC or GB/T evidence may support technical review, but it does not by itself establish Samoa import clearance, MCIL treatment, OOTR/EPC acceptance, or project compliance.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930，以及适用时的中国国内认证或质量控制要求准备文件。中国CCC或GB/T证据可支持技术审查，但其本身不能证明萨摩亚进口清关、MCIL处理、OOTR/EPC接受或项目合规。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930，以及適用時的中國國內認證或質量控制要求準備文件。中國CCC或GB/T證據可支持技術審查，但其本身不能證明薩摩亞進口清關、MCIL處理、OOTR/EPC接受或項目合規。

gap.en: Before claiming Samoa readiness, exporters should confirm importer responsibility, HS classification, electrical safety evidence, English labelling and manuals, warranty and spare parts, environmental suitability, EPC site acceptance, OOTR electricity-sector expectations, and whether the charger includes radio, modem, meter, payment terminal, or software features that trigger additional approvals. China domestic certificates are not a substitute for Samoa-specific import and project checks.
gap.zh: 在宣称适用于萨摩亚前，出口商应确认进口商责任、HS归类、电气安全证据、英文标签和手册、保修与备件、环境适用性、EPC站点验收、OOTR电力行业预期，以及充电桩是否包含无线、调制解调器、计量、支付终端或软件功能而触发额外审批。中国国内证书不能替代萨摩亚特定进口和项目核查。
gap.zht: 在宣稱適用於薩摩亞前，出口商應確認進口商責任、HS歸類、電氣安全證據、英文標籤和手冊、保修與備件、環境適用性、EPC站點驗收、OOTR電力行業預期，以及充電樁是否包含無線、調製解調器、計量、支付終端或軟件功能而觸發額外審批。中國國內證書不能替代薩摩亞特定進口和項目核查。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional - confirm current MCIL/customs/OOTR/EPC treatment, HS code, telecom functions, and project-specific requirements for the exact charger configuration before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China domestic scope; GB/T or CCC evidence is not a Samoa market-access substitute

source.publisher: Samoa Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Samoa market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify current MCIL, customs, OOTR, EPC, telecom, IEC evidence, labelling, and environmental requirements for the specific charger configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足萨摩亚市场准入。应核实具体充电桩配置当前的MCIL、海关、OOTR、EPC、电信、IEC证据、标签及环境要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足薩摩亞市場准入。應核實具體充電樁配置當前的MCIL、海關、OOTR、EPC、電信、IEC證據、標籤及環境要求。

requirement_topic.en: Samoa EV Market Context - Very Early Demand, Renewable Targets, and Apia Sea Freight
requirement_topic.zh: 萨摩亚电动汽车市场背景——极早期需求、可再生能源目标及阿皮亚海运
requirement_topic.zht: 薩摩亞電動汽車市場背景——極早期需求、可再生能源目標及阿皮亞海運

summary.en: Samoa is a Pacific small-island developing state with a very early or essentially non-existent EV charging market. Demand is more likely to arise through government, utility, resort, fleet, donor-funded, climate, or renewable-energy-linked projects than through a mature private charging network. Samoa's high renewable-energy target and island-grid constraints make managed charging, power quality, and site-by-site EPC acceptance important. Physical logistics are also part of readiness: charger imports normally move by sea freight through Apia, so packaging, corrosion protection, spare parts, warranty service, and lead-time planning matter.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚是太平洋小岛屿发展中国家，电动汽车充电市场处于极早期或基本不存在。需求更可能来自政府、公用事业、度假村、车队、援助资金、气候或可再生能源相关项目，而非成熟的私人充电网络。萨摩亚较高的可再生能源目标和岛国电网约束，使有序充电、电能质量和逐站EPC验收十分重要。物流也是适用性的一部分：充电桩进口通常经阿皮亚海运，因此包装、防腐、备件、保修服务和交期规划都很关键。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞是太平洋小島嶼發展中國家，電動汽車充電市場處於極早期或基本不存在。需求更可能來自政府、公用事業、度假村、車隊、援助資金、氣候或可再生能源相關項目，而非成熟的私人充電網絡。薩摩亞較高的可再生能源目標和島國電網約束，使有序充電、電能質量和逐站EPC驗收十分重要。物流也是適用性的一部分：充電樁進口通常經阿皮亞海運，因此包裝、防腐、備件、保修服務和交期規劃都很關鍵。

standards_or_laws: Samoa national energy and renewable-energy policy context
Project-owner technical specifications for public, fleet, resort, and donor-funded charging sites
Sea-freight import route through Apia and importer logistics requirements

summary.en: China's large domestic EV charging market is based on GB/T connector and communication standards and mature domestic grid approval practice. Those strengths support manufacturing scale but do not remove the Samoa-specific need for IEC connectors, 230/400 V validation, coastal cyclone and salt-mist design, project-level acceptance, and sea-freight service planning.
summary.zh: 中国庞大的国内电动汽车充电市场基于GB/T接口和通信标准及成熟的国内电网审批实践。这些优势支持制造规模，但不能消除萨摩亚对IEC接口、230/400 V验证、沿海气旋和盐雾设计、项目级验收及海运服务规划的具体需求。
summary.zht: 中國龐大的國內電動汽車充電市場基於GB/T接口和通訊標準及成熟的國內電網審批實踐。這些優勢支持製造規模，但不能消除薩摩亞對IEC接口、230/400 V驗證、沿海氣旋和鹽霧設計、項目級驗收及海運服務規劃的具體需求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021-2035 (China)

gap.en: Chinese exporters should treat Samoa as a project-led, IEC-aligned Pacific island market rather than a mature catalogue-sale market. Confirm the owner's specification before bidding, avoid quoting GB/T-only hardware, allocate lead time for Type 2 / CCS2 conversion, validate 230/400 V input range, prepare salt-mist and cyclone exposure documentation, and plan local service support, spare parts, packaging, and sea-freight lead times through Apia.
gap.zh: 中国出口商应将萨摩亚视为项目驱动、IEC体系的太平洋岛国市场，而非成熟的目录销售市场。投标前确认业主规范，避免报价仅支持GB/T的硬件，为Type 2 / CCS2转换预留交期，验证230/400 V输入范围，准备盐雾和气旋暴露文件，并规划本地服务支持、备件、包装和经阿皮亚海运交期。
gap.zht: 中國出口商應將薩摩亞視為項目驅動、IEC體系的太平洋島國市場，而非成熟的目錄銷售市場。投標前確認業主規範，避免報價僅支持GB/T的硬件，為Type 2 / CCS2轉換預留交期，驗證230/400 V輸入範圍，準備鹽霧和氣旋暴露文件，並規劃本地服務支持、備件、包裝和經阿皮亞海運交期。

mandatory_status.target: Policy, market, and logistics context - not itself a product standard; project, import, EPC, OOTR, IEC evidence, and logistics obligations remain separate
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only - China domestic EV policy and scale do not satisfy Samoa project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Samoa's EV market should be framed honestly as very early-stage. Project opportunity may come from renewable-energy, government, fleet, resort, or donor channels, but compliance work remains: connector, voltage, IEC evidence, EMC, EPC acceptance, coastal derating, service, and Apia sea-freight planning are separate workstreams.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应如实将萨摩亚电动汽车市场表述为极早期。项目机会可能来自可再生能源、政府、车队、度假村或援助渠道，但合规工作并不会减少：接口、电压、IEC证据、EMC、EPC验收、沿海降额、服务和阿皮亚海运规划都是独立工作流。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應如實將薩摩亞電動汽車市場表述為極早期。項目機會可能來自可再生能源、政府、車隊、度假村或援助渠道，但合規工作並不會減少：接口、電壓、IEC證據、EMC、EPC驗收、沿海降額、服務和阿皮亞海運規劃都是獨立工作流。
